app.name: GitHub Contributions API
app.one_liner: A Deno-based API that fetches and renders GitHub user contribution data in multiple formats including JSON, SVG, terminal text, and plain text.

screens.name: Main Endpoint
screens.purpose: Serve as the public entry point for fetching and rendering GitHub contributions data via HTTP requests.

rust_commands.name: fetch_contributions
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve GitHub contributions data for a given user using their personal access token.

rust_commands.name: render_contributions
rust_commands.purpose: Convert raw contributions data into a specified output format (JSON, SVG, terminal, or plain text).

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for multiple output formats
week 1: Deploy to Deno Deploy with public endpoint
week 1: Implement core contributions fetching logic
acceptance_tests: The API returns a valid SVG when queried with format=svg
The API returns valid JSON when queried with format=json
The API successfully renders terminal-formatted output with a random color scheme
The public endpoint responds correctly to curl requests without installation
